reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para descansar y comer bajo los árboles,pensado para el viajero, muy higiénico,lo recomiendo,es un lugar de paso pero tiene mucho flow

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for resting and eating under the trees, designed with the traveler in mind, very hygienic, I recommend it, it's a place you pass through but it has a great vibe
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMjdhZUdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar. Es nuestra parada obligada cuando viajamos a la costa. Provisto de mesas y sillas de concreto debajo de hermosos árboles. Tenes autoservicio para comprar o te llevas vos lo que querés. Los baños limpisimos y provistos de todo para la higiene personal. Súper recomendables.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. It's our must-stop when we travel to the coast. It has concrete tables and chairs under beautiful trees. You can buy groceries or take what you want with you. The restrooms are spotless and fully equipped for personal hygiene. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMi1iOFZBEAE
